text: 7. Supply and install 2cm Eased Edge Daltile Lincoln White NQ59 Leather (SS-5) at all locations shown in the Café including at the Café Service Counter with Waterfall Legs, Café Food & Beverage with 12" Backsplash, Café Queue 1, 2, Cafe, Café Business, Café Lounge, and Café Men's and Women's restrooms with 4" Backsplash Tops.
